component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor

marker.ph: /// <para>Constructs a new vector with given x, y components.</para> ...
/// <para>Set x and y components of an existing Vector2.</para> ...
/// <para>Linearly interpolates between vectors a and b by t.</para> ...
/// <para>Linearly interpolates between vectors a and b by t.</para> ...
/// <para>Multiplies every component of this vector by the same component of scale.</para> ...
/// <para>Makes this vector have a magnitude of 1.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns this vector with a magnitude of 1 (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a formatted string for this vector.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a formatted string for this vector.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a formatted string for this vector.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns true if the given vector is exactly equal to this vector.</para> ...
/// <para>Reflects a vector off the vector defined by a normal.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the 2D vector perpendicular to this 2D vector. The result is always rotated 90-degrees in a c ...
/// <para>Returns the length of this vector (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the squared length of this vector (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Gets the unsigned angle in degrees between from and to.</para> ...
/// <para>Gets the signed angle in degrees between from and to.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the distance between a and b.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a copy of vector with its magnitude clamped to maxLength.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a vector that is made from the smallest components of two vectors.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a vector that is made from the largest components of two vectors.</para> ...
/// <para>Calculate a position between the points specified by current and target, moving no farther than the d ...
/// <para>Creates a new vector with given x, y, z components.</para> ...
/// <para>Creates a new vector with given x, y components and sets z to zero.</para> ...
/// <para>Set x, y and z components of an existing Vector3.</para> ...
/// <para>Multiplies every component of this vector by the same component of scale.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns true if the given vector is exactly equal to this vector.</para> ...
/// <para>Reflects a vector off the plane defined by a normal.</para> ...
/// <para>Makes this vector have a magnitude of 1.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns this vector with a magnitude of 1 (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Projects a vector onto a plane defined by a normal orthogonal to the plane.</para> ...
/// <para>Calculates the angle between vectors from and.</para> ...
/// <para>Calculates the signed angle between vectors from and to in relation to axis.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the distance between a and b.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a copy of vector with its magnitude clamped to maxLength.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the length of this vector (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Returns the squared length of this vector (Read Only).</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a vector that is made from the smallest components of two vectors.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a vector that is made from the largest components of two vectors.</para> ...
/// <para>Returns a formatted string for this vector.</para> ...
